'''âr-p-b-k''' ('''karapbekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:elizabethanize|elizabethanize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-b-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elizabethanize|elizabethanize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-p-b-k
|-
! Lemma
| karapbekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirapbekoko|thirapbekoko]] || [[word:jirapbekoko|jirapbekoko]] || [[word:shirapbekoko|shirapbekoko]] || [[word:kirapbekoko|kirapbekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurapbekoko|thuthurapbekoko]] || [[word:jujurapbekoko|jujurapbekoko]] || [[word:shushurapbekoko|shushurapbekoko]] || [[word:kukurapbekoko|kukurapbekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurapbekoko|thurapbekoko]] || [[word:jurapbekoko|jurapbekoko]] || [[word:shurapbekoko|shurapbekoko]] || [[word:kurapbekoko|kurapbekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurapbekoko|thurapbekoko]] || [[word:jurapbekoko|jurapbekoko]] || [[word:shurapbekoko|shurapbekoko]] || [[word:kurapbekoko|kurapbekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therapbekoko|therapbekoko]] || [[word:jerapbekoko|jerapbekoko]] || [[word:sherapbekoko|sherapbekoko]] || [[word:kerapbekoko|kerapbekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorapbekoko|thothorapbekoko]] || [[word:jojorapbekoko|jojorapbekoko]] || [[word:shoshorapbekoko|shoshorapbekoko]] || [[word:kokorapbekoko|kokorapbekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorapbekoko|thorapbekoko]] || [[word:jorapbekoko|jorapbekoko]] || [[word:shorapbekoko|shorapbekoko]] || [[word:korapbekoko|korapbekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorapbekoko|thorapbekoko]] || [[word:jorapbekoko|jorapbekoko]] || [[word:shorapbekoko|shorapbekoko]] || [[word:korapbekoko|korapbekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrapbekoko|thĂŠrapbekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠrapbekoko|jĂŠrapbekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠrapbekoko|shĂŠrapbekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠrapbekoko|kĂŠrapbekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharapbekoko|thatharapbekoko]] || [[word:jajarapbekoko|jajarapbekoko]] || [[word:shasharapbekoko|shasharapbekoko]] || [[word:kakarapbekoko|kakarapbekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharapbekoko|tharapbekoko]] || [[word:jarapbekoko|jarapbekoko]] || [[word:sharapbekoko|sharapbekoko]] || [[word:karapbekoko|karapbekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharapbekoko|tharapbekoko]] || [[word:jarapbekoko|jarapbekoko]] || [[word:sharapbekoko|sharapbekoko]] || [[word:karapbekoko|karapbekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
